CONTACTID.TEXT: Hello Sir. You've called 9-1-1 because of too loud music?
Hello Officer, yes, i called the police cause they are playing the music too loud.
Did you talk to the owner to turn the volume down?
No I did not. It is the house over there.
Well next time please try yourself. This time i will talk to the owner.
Ok, thanks.
Hello? Can I please talk to the owner of this property?
Sure, I'm the new owner of this house. What can I do for you officer?
We have a complaint regarding your party. Could you please lower the volume?
Man, must be that stupid prick next to me. What has he said ?
I can't give you any details about the complaint. Please just turn down the volume ok ?
Yeah of course, i don't want to make any trouble.
Satisfied with the volume level ?
Yes Sir, thanks for you understanding. Have a nice party.
Goodbye officer.
Sir, I need to talk to you!
"Oh hell no, what's the problem now ?
I kindly asked you to lower the volume. It seems like it had no effect. Now you need to turn it off!
What ? Do you know how much a party like this costs? Music is essential for me. Therefore it stays on!
I'm sorry but you don't have any other possibility. You had your chance.
You know that I earn more money in a day than you make in a year?
I don't care about your financial situation Sir.
Don't beat around the bush. Turn off the music now or I will do it!
Whatever, but this will have consequences for you!
Give me your name and badge number so that i can make a complaint at the department.
You can get this information directly at the department downtown. Have nice day Sir.
You won't get away with it. This will have repercussions.
My answer is simple. NO. I won't turn off the music!
Then i have no other choice as to take you down to the station. Please show me hands.
I can't believe that shit.
Hi Sir. You called 911. How can i help you ?
Yes Hello, i want you to go over the street and turn off the music. It is annoying.
Relax Sir. How long have they been playing at that volume?
I don't remember. Just go over there and pull the plug.
Ok Sir, please go back inside. I will make contact with the owner and ask him to lower the volume.
No not lowering, it has to be off! You understand ?...
Excuse me. Who is the responsible person for this party?
Oh police. Yeah that's me officer. What's the problem?
Your neighbours are complaining about your noise level.
Come on, these old assholes should crawl back into their coffins!
Please don't insult anybody, just lower the volume please.
I'm really pissed. Ok, I will lower it.
Is it ok now ?
Sure thats fine. Please keep noise level down ok ? Goodbye.
Aha, we will see...
Sir, step over here!
Police again ?... Oh man, what now ?
My last visit seems to have no effect, so now please turn off the music.
What? Come on, i will lower the volume and keep it there, i promise.
Sir you had your chance. Sorry but this time you have to turn it off.
Whats your fucking problem? I said i promise to keep it low.
Your promise is not enough.
Turn it off now or i will do it for you and you can explain it at the station.
Always the same shit with these old bastards!
Happy now ?
Yes and keep it off understood ?
Just leave man.
I don't think i wanna do this. I like it that way.
Well then lets have a chat at the station. Show me your hands.
This is just bullshit.
